sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ عَائِلَةُ حَسَّانٍ زِيَارَةَ أَقَارِبِهَا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hassanova porodica je odlučila posjetiti rodbinu u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan's family decided to visit their relatives in the city.

sentences.arabic: رَكِبُوا السَّيَّارَةَ وَانْطَلَقُوا فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ušli su u auto i krenuli rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: They got in the car and set off early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلُوا بَعْدَ سَاعَةٍ وَاسْتَقْبَلَهُمُ الأَقَارِبُ بِفَرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Stigli su nakon sat vremena i rodbina ih je dočekala radosno.
sentences.translationEn: They arrived after an hour and their relatives welcomed them joyfully.

sentences.translation: Jeli su, razgovarali i smijali se cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: They ate, talked, and laughed all day long.
